SEARCH
Package com.govsim.govsim.model

Class Decision

java.lang.Object
com.govsim.govsim.model.Decision
public class Decision extends Object
Represents a president's decision linked to a dangerous event. Stores the chosen action, its cost, and the resulting outcome.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private String
    choice
    The chosen action title (e.g.
    private double
    cost
    The financial cost of this decision in euros.
    private Event
    event
    The dangerous event this decision responds to.
    private String
    outcome
    The outcome of this decision (default: PENDING).

  • Field Details

    • event

      private Event event
      The dangerous event this decision responds to.

    • choice

      private String choice
      The chosen action title (e.g. DEPLOY, IGNORE).

    • cost

      private double cost
      The financial cost of this decision in euros.

    • outcome

      private String outcome
      The outcome of this decision (default: PENDING).

  • Constructor Details

    • Decision

      public Decision(Event event, String choice, double cost)
      Creates a new Decision for a dangerous event.
      Parameters:
      event - the event being decided on
      choice - the chosen action
      cost - the cost in euros

  • Method Details

    • getEvent

      public Event getEvent()
      Returns the event this decision is linked to.
      Returns:
      the Event object

      public String getChoice()
      Returns the chosen action.

      Returns the financial cost of this decision.
      Returns:
      cost in euros

    • getOutcome

      public String getOutcome()
      Returns the outcome of this decision.
      Returns:
      outcome string (PENDING by default)

    • setOutcome

      public void setOutcome(String outcome)
      Sets the outcome of this decision.
      Parameters:
      outcome - the result string
